command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== DELEGATOR MAIN SOURCE (first 80 lines) ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "head -80 /home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno-delegate" 2>&1

echo '=== HUB MODULE LISTING ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls /home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub/" 2>&1

echo DONE_1915
